title: Each Variable Should Be Declared On Its Own Line
description: Variables should each be declared on a separate line to enhance code readability and to prevent misunderstandings or errors. Multiple variables declared on the same line can be difficult to read and understand.
recommendation: Declare each variable on a new line for better readability.
impact: Improves the readability and clarity of the code, making it easier to understand and maintain.

checks.message: Each variable should be declared on its own line.
